/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/armor_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/serial_driver__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/joint_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/serial_receive_data__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
